items.message: CI is green on main. HEAD commit ca8962649 has 965 check runs with 0 failures. Failures on the two previous commits (1a249e97, 36b71701) are CI pipeline infrastructure issues (unresolved Azure DevOps variable references like $(PackagePath) and job cancellations/timeouts), not unit test failures — test results for those runs show 0 failing tests. No GitHub issue required.
